title: Refugium
description: Basic Modpack for the Refugium Servers
body:
This modpack was created to help players connect quickly and easily to the Refugium Minecraft servers. Whether you're participating in long-term community worlds, roleplay-driven events, or creative survival challenges, this pack removes the technical barriers and lets you jump straight into the experience. All included mods are strictly client-side, meaning they won’t affect server gameplay or provide unfair advantages — they simply improve your performance, visuals, and comfort while playing. There’s no manual setup required: just install with the Modrinth launcher, launch Minecraft, and you’re ready to go. We highly recommend this pack for all players who want the best possible experience on our servers. → Join our Discord: [discord.gg/refugium](https://discord.gg/refugium) → Learn more at: [refugium.me](https://refugium.me)
Included Mods (18) - [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) – Boosts FPS and optimizes rendering. - [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) – Improves performance of game logic. - [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra) – Adds extra video settings to Sodium. - [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) – Optimizes immediate rendering. - [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) – Enables shaders with Sodium support. - [MakeUp – Ultra Fast](https://modrinth.com/mod/makeup-ultra-fast-shaders) – Lightweight shader pack with vibrant visuals. - [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights) – Adds dynamic lighting. - [Plasmo Voice](https://modrinth.com/mod/plasmo-voice) – Proximity-based voice chat. - [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify) – Adds smooth zoom (like OptiFine). - [YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)](https://modrinth.com/mod/yet-another-config-lib) – In-game config menus for client mods. - [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) – Required mod library for most Fabric mods. - [Kotlin Language](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin) – Kotlin runtime for mods that need it. - [BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3) – Replaceing Minecraft's original debug HUD. - [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps) – Reduce resource usage while Minecraft is in the background, idle, or on battery. - [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) – Smarter rendering. Less overhead. More performance. - [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) – This mod reduces the memory usage of Minecraft in a few different ways. - [Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered) – Realistic sound attenuation, reverberation, and absorption through blocks. - [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) – Adds a mod menu to view the list of mods you have installed.
